choices.text: ERC-2612 permit: user signs approval off-chain → DEX submits permit + transferFrom in single tx. No prior on-chain approve. Inherit ERC20Permit from OpenZeppelin.
OpenZeppelin SafeERC20: using SafeERC20 for IERC20; safeTransfer, safeApprove. Wraps standard calls + reverts on failure. Handles USDT (no bool return), fee-on-transfer, and weird tokens.

questions.explanation: SafeERC20 wraps quirks; reverts on failure.
